remaining_tasks.name: plan-phase 18 (18-02-PLAN.md — dnspython scanner, RFC 8624 classifier, CBOM integration, BIND9 chaos lab)

decisions.decision: One CryptoEndpoint per DNSKEY record (not per domain)
decisions.rationale: Finest CBOM granularity, matches JWT scanner pattern

decisions.decision: 3-tier severity map: CRITICAL (deprecated algs), HIGH (RSA-based quantum-vulnerable), Safe (ECDSA/EdDSA)
decisions.rationale: RSASHA256/512 are HIGH for quantum-readiness angle; ECDSAP256/384/ED25519/ED448 produce no finding
Operational info-disclosure risk, not a cryptographic weakness
RFC 8624 deprecates it; requires second-preimage for exploitation

decisions.decision: 4 BIND9 zones: weak.chaos.local (RSASHA1+NSEC), safe.chaos.local (ECDSAP256+NSEC3), broken.chaos.local (DS mismatch), unsigned.chaos.local
decisions.rationale: Full requirement coverage for all 7 DNSSEC requirements in one BIND9 container

decisions.decision: Pre-signed zone files baked into Docker image; dedicated `dnssec` profile
decisions.rationale: Deterministic key tags for CI; lightweight profile matches success criteria 5 wording

decisions.decision: Retry once then skip on DNS failure; auto-resolve authoritative NS from domain; UDP→TCP fallback
decisions.rationale: Standard DNS transport behavior; dnspython handles TC bit natively

decisions.decision: scan_dnssec_targets(targets, timeout=10, logger) — matches JWT scanner signature exactly
decisions.rationale: Consistent API across all scanner modules

decisions.decision: cert_pubkey_alg field used for DNSSEC algorithm in CBOM builder branch
Sequential domain scanning (no threading); 5s per-query timeout
decisions.rationale: DNS is fast enough; can add threading later if needed

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 18 (after /clear for fresh context). CONTEXT.md is complete with all decisions.
context_notes: Phase 17 (identity infrastructure) is fully complete and verified. Phase 18 discuss-phase just finished — 7 gray areas covered. GSD settings updated: research_before_questions = true. Clean pause point — no in-flight code changes.
